query: Compare the capital, currency, and primary language of Japan, Brazil, and Egypt, then note which has the most native speakers of its language.
Compare the land areas of Russia, Canada, and China, and say which is largest.
Compare the climate, cuisine, and main language of Italy, Thailand, and Mexico, then say which is hottest on average.
Contrast the keto, vegan, and Mediterranean diets on protein source, cost, and sustainability.
Compare React, Vue, Svelte, and Angular on learning curve, and recommend one for a beginner.
For each of Python, Rust, and Go, name one key strength and one common use case.
For each of the heart, the brain, and the liver, state its primary function in one sentence.
What are the capitals of France, Germany, Italy, and Spain?
Research three renewable energy sources independently — solar, wind, and hydro — and give one advantage of each.
Research the headquarters city and flagship product of Apple, Microsoft, and Nvidia.
Summarize each of the water cycle, the carbon cycle, and the nitrogen cycle in one sentence.
Analyze the strengths and weaknesses of TCP, UDP, and QUIC for real-time video.
Evaluate the pros and cons of remote work, hybrid work, and office work for team productivity.
Audit a typical web app across three dimensions — security, performance, and cost — and give one concrete risk per dimension.
Review each of the onboarding, billing, and support flows and flag one UX issue per flow.
Plan a weekly study schedule covering math, history, and biology: for each subject give one focus topic and one resource.
Plan a three-course dinner — an appetizer, a main, and a dessert — with one dish suggestion for each.
Three quick questions: who wrote Hamlet? what year did World War II end? what is the chemical symbol for gold?
What is the capital of France?
What is 2 + 2?
Who painted the Mona Lisa?
What is the boiling point of water at sea level in Celsius?
Define osmosis in one sentence.
Summarize this idea in one line: a plant turns sunlight into energy.
What is the capital and currency of Japan?
Who founded Microsoft and in what year?
Compare this option to the other one and tell me which is better.
Evaluate whether I should bring an umbrella today.
Compare apples and oranges.
Name a fruit, a vegetable, and a grain.
List three prime numbers.

Produce a competitive brief on six cloud data warehouses — Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks SQL, ClickHouse, and Firebolt. For each, cover its pricing model, scaling architecture, ideal workload, one notable limitation, and a representative use case. Then rank them for a 50-person analytics startup.

Compare eight sorting algorithms — quicksort, mergesort, heapsort, timsort, radix sort, bubble sort, insertion sort, and counting sort — across average time complexity, worst-case time complexity, space complexity, and stability. Then recommend one for nearly-sorted data and one for large random integer keys.

Research the founding year, headquarters city, flagship product, primary revenue source, and one major acquisition for each of Stripe, Plaid, Square, Adyen, and Wise. Then group the five by business model.

Audit a public REST API design across seven dimensions — authentication, rate limiting, versioning, error format, pagination, idempotency, and observability. For each dimension give the current best practice and a common pitfall, then summarize the top three risks.

Review a Kubernetes production setup across six areas — resource limits, liveness/readiness probes, secrets management, network policies, autoscaling, and disaster recovery. For each, state the recommended configuration and the most common misconfiguration, then call out the single biggest gap.

For each of five chronic conditions — type 2 diabetes, hypertension, COPD, chronic kidney disease, and heart failure — summarize the typical first-line treatment, one key lifestyle intervention, and one common comorbidity. Then note which two most often co-occur.

Design a four-week onboarding program for a new backend engineer, split into four independent workstreams — codebase ramp-up, tooling and environment, first-project scoping, and team and process integration. For each workstream give three concrete milestones and a success signal, then sequence the four across the weeks.

For six European capitals — Paris, Berlin, Madrid, Rome, Amsterdam, and Vienna — give the country, a signature landmark, the local language, and one well-known local dish. Then identify which two are closest geographically.
List the seven continents.
Name the planets of the solar system in order from the Sun.
